ROBINSON $7,073.00 PRINCIPAL, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,164.00, THE SUM OF $7164.00 WILL BE PAID BY DEFT IN MONTHLY INSTALL- MENTS OF NOT LESS THAN $75.00 DUE & PAYABLE ON THE 30TH OF EACH MONTH COMMENCING ON 5-30-99 & CONTINUING UNTIL $7164.00 IS PAID IN FULL.
